intro.title: Vorsorge Wizard
intro.subtitle: Create your advance directive documents easily
intro.patientenverfuegung: The advance directive (Patientenverfügung) specifies your wishes for medical treatment when you can no longer speak for yourself.
intro.vorsorgevollmacht: The power of attorney (Vorsorgevollmacht) authorizes a trusted person to make decisions on your behalf.
intro.betreuungsverfuegung: The guardianship directive (Betreuungsverfügung) gives instructions for a court-appointed guardian.
intro.disclaimer: Note: Vorsorge Wizard is not a legal advice service. Generated documents are based on your inputs and standard formulations. For individual legal review, we recommend consulting a notary or lawyer.

step2.title: Trusted Person
step2.description: This person will be authorized to act on your behalf when you cannot.

step3.title: Medical Treatment Preferences
step3.description: How would you like to be treated in the following situations?
step3.cprTooltip: Cardiopulmonary resuscitation in case of cardiac arrest
step3.ventilationTooltip: Artificial ventilation in case of respiratory failure
step3.dialysisTooltip: Blood filtration in case of kidney failure

step4.title: Situational Scenarios
step4.description: In which situations should your directive apply?

step5.title: Additional Wishes and Values
step5.description: Optional: Do you have any further wishes?
step5.placeholder: e.g. religious beliefs, wishes regarding place of death, saying goodbye to loved ones...

step7.title: Create Account
step7.description: Your information will only be saved when you create an account.

step8.title: Download Documents
step8.printHint: Print the documents and keep them in a safe place. Notarization of the power of attorney is recommended in many cases.
